message:
test(lab): add topology benchmark comparing exploration strategies

Add deterministic benchmark suite that validates topology-prioritized
exploration (using H1 persistent homology) reaches concurrency violations
faster than naive seed-sweep exploration.

Bug shapes tested:
- Deadlock square: two tasks acquiring resources in opposite orders
- Obligation leak: task completes without resolving obligations
- Lost wakeup: race between condition check and notification

Metrics tracked:
- Explored nodes to first violation
- Equivalence classes discovered per run
- Stability across repeated runs (determinism verification)

Acceptance criteria (bd-1ny4): prioritized exploration must reach
violations in fewer runs on at least one benchmark, deterministically.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
